hindi: जय बटुक भैरव भगवान। काशी के द्वारपाल महान॥
english: Victory to Batuka Bhairava, the Lord; great guardian of the gates of Kashi
roman: Jai Batuk Bhairav Bhagwan, Kashi Ke Dwarpal Mahan

hindi: बटुक रूप में शिव अवतार। नवरात्रि में पूजन सार॥
english: Shiva incarnate in the form of Batuka; the essence of worship during Navratri
roman: Batuk Roop Mein Shiv Avatar, Navratri Mein Poojan Sar

hindi: बाल रूप में भैरव सोहे। भक्त जन का मन वो मोहे॥
english: Bhairav shines in the form of a child; enchanting the minds of devotees
roman: Bal Roop Mein Bhairav Sohe, Bhakt Jan Ka Man Vo Mohe

hindi: भूत प्रेत और ऊपरी बाधा। बटुक भैरव करते सब साधा॥
english: Ghosts, spirits and all supernatural disturbances; Batuka Bhairava resolves them all
roman: Bhoot Pret Aur Oopari Baadha, Batuk Bhairav Karte Sab Sadha

hindi: मद्य मांस का भोग प्रिय। श्मशान में साधना करते नय॥
english: He is fond of wine and meat offerings; he is worshipped in cremation grounds uniquely
roman: Madya Maans Ka Bhog Priya, Shamshan Mein Sadhna Karte Nay

hindi: बटुक भैरव चालीसा पढ़े। भय और शत्रु से नहीं डरे॥
english: Whoever reads the Batuka Bhairava Chalisa; fears neither fear nor enemies
roman: Batuk Bhairav Chalisa Padhe, Bhay Aur Shatru Se Nahin Dare

hindi: जय जय बटुक भैरव। शिव के रुद्र रूप महाभैरव॥
english: Victory to Batuka Bhairava; Mahabhairava, the Rudra form of Shiva
roman: Jai Jai Batuk Bhairav, Shiv Ke Rudra Roop Mahabhairav
